creator: dennisjun@yahoo.com
text:
Basically the ssh2 and tcsh ports won't make install. I did a cvsup of the ports about 2 days ago and those 2 ports seem to be broken.

Fix: 

I THINK it's a simple typo in the Makefile, but since I'm a UN*X and FreeBSD newbie, don't take my word for it :)
How-To-Repeat: do a make install in /usr/ports/security/ssh2 and /usr/ports/shells/tcsh/
